title: colax harrisoniae
intro: Colax harrisoniae, also known as Cola harrisoniae, is a plant species belonging to the family Malpighiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Colax harrisoniae lie in its seeds, which have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other health conditions due to their analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Colax harrisoniae include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Colax harrisoniae can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the seeds in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
